scripts.clean: docker compose -f compose/handler.yml -f compose/handler.dev.yml down --volumes --remove-orphans; docker compose -f compose/employer.yml -f compose/employer.dev.yml down --volumes --remove-orphans; docker compose -f compose.benefit.yml down --volumes --remove-orphans;
scripts.employer:dev: cross-env COMPOSE_HTTP_TIMEOUT=200 docker compose -f compose/employer.yml -f compose/employer.dev.yml
scripts.employer:linux: cross-env COMPOSE_HTTP_TIMEOUT=200 UID=$(id -u) GID=$(id -g) docker compose -f compose/employer.yml -f compose/employer.dev.yml -f compose/linux.yml
scripts.handler:dev: cross-env COMPOSE_HTTP_TIMEOUT=200 docker compose -f compose/handler.yml -f compose/handler.dev.yml
scripts.handler:linux: cross-env COMPOSE_HTTP_TIMEOUT=200 UID=$(id -u) GID=$(id -g) docker compose -f compose/handler.yml -f compose/handler.dev.yml -f compose/linux.yml
scripts.youth:dev: cross-env COMPOSE_HTTP_TIMEOUT=200 docker compose -f compose/handler.yml -f compose/handler.dev.yml
scripts.youth:linux: cross-env COMPOSE_HTTP_TIMEOUT=200 UID=$(id -u) GID=$(id -g) docker compose -f compose/handler.yml -f compose/handler.dev.yml -f compose/linux.yml
scripts.benefit:rebuild: pnpm clean; rm -rf frontend/benefit/applicant/.next; pnpm benefit build --no-cache; pnpm benefit:up
scripts.employer:rebuild: pnpm clean; rm -rf frontend/kesaseteli/employer/.next; pnpm employer build --no-cache; pnpm employer:up
scripts.employer:prod:rebuild: pnpm clean; rm -rf frontend/kesaseteli/employer/.next; pnpm employer:prod build --no-cache; pnpm employer:prod:up
scripts.handler:rebuild: pnpm clean; rm -rf frontend/kesaseteli/*/.next; pnpm handler build --no-cache; pnpm handler:up
scripts.handler:prod:rebuild: pnpm clean; rm -rf frontend/kesaseteli/*/.next; pnpm handler:prod build --no-cache; pnpm handler:prod:up
scripts.youth:rebuild: pnpm clean; rm -rf frontend/kesaseteli/youth/.next; pnpm youth build --no-cache; pnpm youth:up
scripts.youth:prod:rebuild: pnpm clean; rm -rf frontend/kesaseteli/youth/.next; pnpm youth:prod build --no-cache; pnpm youth:prod:up
